MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Northridge Coopervative Homes, is present. Represented by Kevin Barr.
Attorney, David Briggs, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jhonelle Ahmed, is present.
Attorney, John Lough , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem C. Zadik Shapiro, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
